procurementRequest.title: Procurement Request
procurementRequest.description: Represents a request for procuring goods or services for a specific period.

companyId.description: The ID of the company this request is for.

companyName.description: The name of the company this request is for.

department.description: The department name requesting the procurement.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department requesting the procurement.

period.description: The period for which the procurement is requested (e.g., 'Feb 2026').

total.description: The total value of the procurement request.

status.description: The current status of the approval workflow.

submittedBy.description: The name of the user who submitted the request.

submittedById.description: The UID of the user who submitted the request.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the request was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the request was last updated.

timeline.description: An ordered list of stages and their status in the approval process.

actorId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action at this stage.

delegatedById.description: If approved by a delegate, the UID of the user who delegated the authority.

delegatedByName.description: If approved by a delegate, the name of the user who delegated the authority.

fingerprint.description: A SHA-256 hash of the request data at the time of this action, ensuring data integrity.

comments.description: A log of comments and queries related to the request.

items.description: The list of individual items being procured.

expenseType.description: Defines if the item is an operational or capital expense.

estimatedLeadTimeDays.description: The estimated number of days for fulfillment, suggested by AI and adjustable by procurement officers.

comments.description: Comments or justification for this specific line item, especially if it's over budget.

addedById.description: The UID of the user who added this line item.

addedByName.description: The name of the user who added this line item.

delegatorIdForApproval.description: A temporary field used by security rules to verify a delegated approval action.

userProfile.title: User Profile
userProfile.description: Stores public information about a user.

role.description: The user's role in the application, which determines their permissions.

companyIds.description: An array of company IDs this user is associated with.

department.description: The name of the department this user belongs to or manages.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department this user belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the user account.

alternateEmail.description: An alternative email address for notifications.

notificationPreference.description: Determines where to send email notifications.

delegatedToId.description: The UID of the user this user has delegated approval authority to.

delegatedToName.description: The display name of the user this user has delegated approval authority to.

reportingDepartments.description: For Executive roles, an array of department IDs they are responsible for reporting on and approving requests for.

department.title: Department
department.description: Represents a department within the organization.

managerId.description: The UID of the user who manages this department.

budget.description: The approved budget for the department.

companyIds.description: An array of company IDs this department is associated with.

workflow.description: An ordered list of stages and their permissions for this department's approval process.

approvalGroupId.description: The ID of the approval group assigned to this stage.

approvalGroupName.description: The name of the approval group assigned to this stage.

useAlternateEmail.description: Whether to use an alternative email for notifications at this stage.

alternateEmail.description: The alternative email address for notifications.

sendToBoth.description: Whether to send notifications to both the primary and alternative email.

budgetYear.description: The financial year for which the budget headers and imported data are valid.

budgetHeaders.description: The headers for the monthly budget forecasts.

periodSettings.description: Settings for each procurement period, like 'Open' or 'Locked'.

role.title: Role
role.description: Defines a user role and its permissions within the application.

permissions.description: A list of permission keys granted to this role.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: Represents a supplier of goods or services.

name.description: The official name of the vendor.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person at the vendor.

email.description: The contact email for the vendor.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the vendor.

address.description: The physical or mailing address of the vendor.

category.description: The primary category of goods/services the vendor provides (e.g., 'IT Hardware', 'Office Supplies').

status.description: The current status of the vendor.

recurringItem.title: Recurring Item
recurringItem.description: Defines a procurement item that recurs on a schedule.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department this recurring item is associated with.

departmentName.description: The name of the department this recurring item is associated with.

adminIsSetUp.description: Flag to indicate if the first administrator has been created.

limitToOneSubmissionPerPeriod.description: If true, allows only one active procurement request per department per period.

reminderSettings.description: Settings for automated approval reminders. Default frequency is daily.

autoLogoutEnabled.description: If true, users will be logged out after a period of inactivity.

inactivityTimeoutMinutes.description: The number of minutes of inactivity before a user is logged out.

pdfSettings.description: Settings for customizing generated PDF reports.

primaryColor.description: The primary color (hex code) for report headers.

auditEvent.title: Audit Event
auditEvent.description: Records a single significant action taken by a user within the application.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

action.description: A key identifying the action, e.g., 'user.login', 'request.create'.

type.description: The type of entity affected, e.g., 'procurementRequest'.

id.description: The ID of the affected entity document.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the event was recorded.

details.description: A human-readable description of the action.

fingerprint.description: A SHA-256 hash of the associated entity data at the time of the event.

errorLog.title: Error Log
errorLog.description: Records a client-side error that occurred within the application.

userId.description: The UID of the user who encountered the error.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

action.description: A key identifying the action being performed when the error occurred.

errorMessage.description: The error message from the exception.

errorStack.description: The stack trace of the error, if available.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the error was recorded.

budgetUpload.title: Budget Upload
budgetUpload.description: Represents a version of an imported budget forecast.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department this budget upload belongs to.

financialYear.description: The financial year for this budget.

isActive.description: Whether this is the currently active budget for the department and year.

budgetItem.title: Budget Item
budgetItem.description: Represents a single budget line item from an external sheet, associated with a specific department and upload.

budgetUploadId.description: The ID of the budget upload this item belongs to.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department this budget item belongs to.

departmentName.description: The name of the department this budget item belongs to.

forecasts.description: Monthly forecast values for the budget year.

yearTotal.description: The total budgeted amount for the year.

company.title: Company
company.description: Represents a company or legal entity.

approvalGroup.title: Approval Group
approvalGroup.description: A group of users who can collectively approve requests at a workflow stage.

name.description: The name of the approval group.

memberIds.description: An array of user IDs who are members of this group.

role.description: The user's role in the application, which determines their permissions.

/approvalGroups/{groupId}.description: Collection of approval groups for workflow stages.

/vendors/{vendorId}.description: Collection of all approved vendors and suppliers.

/recurringItems/{recurringItemId}.description: Collection of all recurring procurement items.

/auditLogs/{logId}.description: Collection of all audit trail events for tracking user actions.

/errorLogs/{errorLogId}.description: Collection of all client-side application errors for debugging.

/budgetUploads/{uploadId}.description: Collection of all imported budget versions.

/budgets/{budgetId}.description: Collection of all imported budget line items.
